productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Dizzy Shopper Black Bags
description: Zoom into a shopping spree with this chunky big Dizzy Shopper bag from puma. Stuff your little pretty buys and sling it across your shoulders in style. Shine with the shimmery shell of the bag and know all those eyes are on you. Length: 47 cm Made of 100% nylon Has branded zippers for durability One copious chamber for storage Zippered chamber with a mobile/iPod chamber inside One small discreet chamber on the front Nylon straps for carrying ease and durability Branding on the corner in the front Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
